steps.t: Tortured Angmarim can be found in Tûr Ágal, the tower in the centre of Caivád Sâr. Múta has asked you to question the Angmarim that have been tortured…
Múta can be found in Tûr Ágal, the tower in the centre of Caivád Sâr. You have learned what you could from the tortured Angmarim. You should report ba…
